nasb.text: The Lord sent fiery serpents among the people and they bit the people, so that many people of Israel died.

esv.text: Then the Lord sent fiery serpents among the people, and they bit the people, so that many people of Israel died.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華打發火蛇進入人民中間；蛇咬他們，許多以色列人就死了。

ccb.text: 于是，耶和华派毒蛇进入以色列人中，咬死了许多人。
